title: 10 best herbal capsules for post nasal drip
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for post nasal drip are dietary supplements that contain a combination of natural herbs, which can help alleviate symptoms of post nasal drip. These herbs can include butterbur, turmeric, and bromelain, which have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties that can help reduce swelling in the nasal passages, thin mucus, and relieve congestion. By taking herbal capsules, individuals can experience improved breathing, reduced sinus pressure, and a decrease in the frequency and severity of post nasal drip symptoms. As a result, herbal capsules can greatly improve an individual's quality of life by allowing them to breathe easier, sleep better, and engage in daily activities without discomfort or interference from post nasal drip symptoms.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Butterfly weed capsule helps with post nasal drip because it contains alkaloids that have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. These alkaloids work by reducing inflammation in the nasal passages, which can help to alleviate the symptoms of post nasal drip. Additionally, the expectorant properties of butterfly weed can help to thin and expel mucus from the respiratory tract, further reducing the symptoms of post nasal drip. By reducing inflammation and promoting the expulsion of mucus, butterfly weed capsules can provide effective relief from post nasal drip.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Butterfly weed capsules can reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, which is important for post nasal drip as it can help alleviate the irritation and swelling that can cause excessive mucus production. The active constituents responsible for this property are the steroidal saponins, such as gitogenin and gitonin.

Expectorant: Butterfly weed capsules can help thin and expel mucus, which is important for post nasal drip as it can help clear the excess mucus that can cause discomfort and difficulty breathing. The active constituents responsible for this property are the alkaloids, such as cynanchine and cynanchinine.

Antimicrobial: Butterfly weed capsules have the ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and viruses, which is important for post nasal drip as it can help prevent the infection that can cause or worsen the condition. The active constituents responsible for this property are the alkaloids, such as cynanchine and cynanchinine, and the saponins, such as gitogenin and gitonin.

Immune-boosting: Butterfly weed capsules can help strengthen the immune system, which is important for post nasal drip as it can help the body fight off the infection that can cause or worsen the condition. The active constituents responsible for this property are the alkaloids, such as cynanchine and cynanchinine, and the saponins, such as gitogenin and gitonin.

Antioxidant: Butterfly weed capsules have antioxidant properties that can help protect the body from damage caused by free radicals, which is important for post nasal drip as it can help reduce the inflammation and oxidative stress that can contribute to the condition. The active constituents responsible for this property are the flavonoids, such as rutin and quercetin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest butterfly weed (Asclepias tuberosa) leaves, ensuring they are fully grown and free from pesticides; dry them for 1-2 weeks in a cool, dark place.
Grind 2 tablespoons of dried butterfly weed leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the ground butterfly weed leaves with 2 tablespoons of organic, softened shea butter until well combined.
Form the mixture into small, equal-sized capsules using a manual capsule filler, filling size "00" capsules.
Store the completed herbal butterfly weed capsules in an airtight container at room temperature, taking 1-2 capsules up to three times daily for post nasal drip relief.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Great mullein capsule helps with post nasal drip because it contains mucilaginous compounds that have a soothing effect on the mucous membranes of the respiratory tract. These compounds form a protective film that helps to reduce inflammation and irritation, thereby alleviating the symptoms of post nasal drip. Additionally, mullein has expectorant properties that help to thin and loosen mucus, making it easier to expel from the body. This herb is also known for its anti-catarrhal and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to reduce the production of excess mucus and provide relief from post nasal drip.
remedy_properties: Expectorant: Great mullein helps loosen and expel mucus from the respiratory tract, providing relief from post nasal drip by reducing mucus buildup. This property is due to the presence of saponins and mucilage in great mullein.

Anti-inflammatory: Great mullein reduces inflammation in the respiratory tract, alleviating irritation and swelling associated with post nasal drip. The anti-inflammatory effects are attributed to the flavonoids and iridoids found in the plant.

Anticatarrhal: Great mullein helps prevent the excessive production of mucus, providing relief from post nasal drip symptoms. This is due to the plant's volatile oils and tannins, which have astringent properties that help regulate mucus secretion.

Antimicrobial: Great mullein inhibits the growth of bacteria and viruses, helping to prevent and treat infections that can cause post nasal drip. The antimicrobial effects are attributed to the plant's essential oils, flavonoids, and saponins.

Demulcent: Great mullein soothes and protects the mucous membranes of the respiratory tract, reducing irritation and inflammation caused by post nasal drip. This is due to the plant's mucilage content, which forms a protective layer on the mucous membranes.
remedy_recipe: Harvest mullein leaves, ensuring they are fully grown and dry, then rinse and let them air dry.
Grind the dried mullein leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or herb mill, resulting in a consistent texture.
Measure out 200-300mg of mullein powder per capsule, using a precision scale for accurate dosing.
Fill size 00 empty gelatin or vegetarian capsules with the measured mullein powder using a capsule filling machine or by hand.
Store the completed mullein capsules in airtight containers, preferably in a cool, dark place, for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Eastern purple coneflower capsule helps with post nasal drip because it contains high levels of echinacea, an active ingredient known for its anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting properties. This herb can help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, thereby alleviating the symptoms of post nasal drip. Additionally, echinacea has been shown to have antimicrobial effects, which can help fight off any potential infections that may be contributing to the post nasal drip. By reducing inflammation and fighting infection, the eastern purple coneflower capsule can provide relief from the constant throat clearing, coughing, and discomfort associated with post nasal drip.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Eastern purple coneflower (Echinacea purpurea) has been shown to reduce inflammation, which is important for post nasal drip as it can help alleviate irritation and swelling in the nasal passages. The active constituents responsible for its anti-inflammatory properties include alkamides, cichoric acid, and polysaccharides.

Immune-boosting: Echinacea purpurea is known to strengthen the immune system, which is crucial for post nasal drip as a robust immune response can help combat infections and reduce excessive mucus production. The main active constituents responsible for its immune-boosting properties are alkamides, polysaccharides, and glycoproteins.

Antimicrobial: Eastern purple coneflower exhibits antimicrobial properties that can help eliminate the bacteria and viruses causing post nasal drip. This property is essential for post nasal drip as it targets the root cause of the issue, promoting faster recovery. The active constituents responsible for its antimicrobial properties include alkamides, cichoric acid, and essential oils.

Analgesic: Echinacea purpurea has analgesic properties that can help alleviate pain and discomfort associated with post nasal drip. This property is important for post nasal drip as it can provide relief from symptoms such as sore throat and headaches. The active constituents responsible for its analgesic properties include alkamides and essential oils.

Mucosal membrane protective: Eastern purple coneflower can help protect and soothe mucosal membranes, which is important for post nasal drip as it can reduce irritation and promote healing in the nasal passages. The active constituents responsible for its mucosal membrane protective properties include polysaccharides, glycoproteins, and essential oils.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2-3 grams of dried Eastern purple coneflower (Echinacea purpurea) herb and grind it into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Measure out 0.5-1 teaspoon of the ground coneflower powder and place it into a capsule-making machine or empty gelatin capsules.
Use the capsule-making machine or manually fill and compress the gelatin capsules to create herbal capsules.
Store the completed coneflower capsules in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight, for up to six months.

Take 1-2 capsules, three times a day, as needed, to help alleviate post nasal drip symptoms. Consult with a healthcare provider for appropriate dosage and potential interactions with other medications.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Goldenseal capsule helps with post nasal drip because it contains the active ingredient berberine, which has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. These properties can help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages and throat, thereby alleviating the symptoms of post nasal drip. Additionally, goldenseal is believed to have immune-boosting effects, which can help the body fight off infections that may be causing or exacerbating post nasal drip. By reducing inflammation, fighting infection, and supporting the immune system, goldenseal capsules can provide relief from post nasal drip and promote overall respiratory health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Goldenseal has anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling in the nasal passages, which can alleviate post nasal drip. The isoquinoline alkaloids, such as berberine, present in goldenseal are responsible for its anti-inflammatory effects.

Antimicrobial: Goldenseal has antimicrobial properties that help fight infections causing post nasal drip. The alkaloids, particularly berberine, exhibit antimicrobial activity against various bacteria and viruses.

Astringent: Goldenseal's astringent properties help tighten and dry mucous membranes, reducing excess mucus production associated with post nasal drip. The tannins found in goldenseal contribute to its astringent properties.

Immune-boosting: Goldenseal supports the immune system, which helps the body fight off infections causing post nasal drip. The isoquinoline alkaloids, including berberine and hydrastine, have been shown to stimulate the immune system.

Mucolytic: Goldenseal has mucolytic properties that help break down and clear mucus, providing relief from post nasal drip. The alkaloids in goldenseal, particularly berberine, have been found to have mucolytic effects.
remedy_recipe: Purchase dried goldenseal root, grind it into a powder, and measure out 500mg for each capsule.
Obtain size 00 empty gelatin capsules and a capsule filling machine.
Fill the capsule halves with the goldenseal powder, using the filling machine, and join the halves together.
Store the completed goldenseal capsules in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Take one capsule three times a day, as needed, to alleviate post nasal drip symptoms.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Thyme capsule helps with post nasal drip because it contains thymol, a compound with antiseptic and antibacterial properties. These properties can help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, soothe irritation, and alleviate symptoms of post nasal drip. Additionally, thyme has been shown to have expectorant effects, which can help loosen and clear mucus from the respiratory tract. By reducing inflammation and helping to clear mucus, thyme capsules can provide relief from the constant throat clearing, coughing, and irritation that often accompany post nasal drip.
remedy_properties: Expectorant: Thyme capsules can help loosen and expel mucus from the respiratory tract, providing relief from post nasal drip by reducing mucus viscosity. This property is attributed to the presence of volatile oils such as thymol and carvacrol.

Antimicrobial: Thyme has the ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and viruses, which can contribute to post nasal drip. The active constituents responsible for this property include thymol, carvacrol, and flavonoids.

Anti-inflammatory: Thyme can help reduce inflammation in the respiratory tract, alleviating irritation and swelling caused by post nasal drip. The flavonoids and phenolic acids present in thyme, such as rosmarinic acid, contribute to its anti-inflammatory effects.

Spasmolytic: Thyme has the ability to relax smooth muscles in the respiratory tract, easing coughing and reducing the sensation of post nasal drip. This property is attributed to the volatile oils, particularly thymol and carvacrol.

Immunostimulant: Thyme can help boost the immune system, which can help the body fight off infections that may cause or worsen post nasal drip. The active constituents responsible for this property include phenolic acids, flavonoids, and essential oils.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2 tablespoons of dried thyme leaves and 1 cup of water; steep thyme in boiling water for 10 minutes to create a strong herbal infusion.
Strain the infusion to remove plant material, allowing it to cool to a comfortable temperature.
Mix 2 teaspoons of powdered gelatin with 2 tablespoons of the cooled thyme infusion in a small bowl until fully combined.
Evenly distribute the gelatin-thyme mixture into empty gelatin capsules, using a capsule filling tool if necessary.
Allow the filled capsules to dry at room temperature for 24 hours before storing in a cool, dark place.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Elderberry capsule helps with post nasal drip because it contains bioflavonoids and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immune-boosting properties. These compounds can help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages and sinuses, which can alleviate post nasal drip. Additionally, elderberry has been shown to have antiviral effects against certain strains of the flu virus, which can help reduce the severity and duration of respiratory infections that can cause post nasal drip. Furthermore, elderberry may help boost the immune system, which can help the body fight off infections and reduce post nasal drip.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Elderberry capsules can help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, which can alleviate the discomfort and irritation caused by post nasal drip. The active constituents responsible for this property include flavonoids and anthocyanins.

Antiviral: Elderberry has been shown to have antiviral properties, which can help reduce the severity and duration of upper respiratory infections, including those that cause post nasal drip. The active constituents responsible for this property include anthocyanins and lectins.

Immune-boosting: Elderberry can help strengthen the immune system, which can make the body more resistant to infections that cause post nasal drip. The active constituents responsible for this property include flavonoids, anthocyanins, and vitamins A and C.

Expectorant: Elderberry can help loosen and expel mucus from the respiratory tract, which can help alleviate post nasal drip. The active constituents responsible for this property include tannins and essential oils.

Antioxidant: Elderberry has strong antioxidant properties, which can help protect the body from damage caused by free radicals and reduce inflammation in the nasal passages. The active constituents responsible for this property include flavonoids, anthocyanins, and vitamins A and C.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2 tablespoons of dried elderberries, 1 teaspoon of cinnamon powder, and 1/2 teaspoon of cloves.
Grind the elderberries and spices in a coffee grinder until a fine powder forms, about 2-3 minutes.
Mix 1 cup of gelatin with 1/2 cup of boiling water until fully dissolved.
Combine the gelatin mixture with the ground elderberries and spices, stirring until a uniform paste forms.
Fill size 00 capsules with the paste, using a capsule filling machine, and let them dry for 24 hours before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: African geranium capsule helps with post nasal drip because it contains pelargonium sidoides, a plant extract that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. These properties can help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, thin and loosen mucus, and promote its removal from the respiratory tract. As a result, taking an African geranium capsule may help alleviate the symptoms of post nasal drip, including a constant need to clear the throat and coughing. Additionally, the herb may also boost the immune system, which can help the body fight off infections that can cause post nasal drip.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: The African geranium (Pelargonium sidoides) has anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling in the nasal passages, which can alleviate post nasal drip. This property is due to the presence of various flavonoids and phenolic acids.

Expectorant: African geranium has an expectorant effect, which helps to thin and expel mucus from the respiratory tract, providing relief for post nasal drip. This is attributed to the high concentration of coumarins and tannins.
Antimicrobial: The herb has antimicrobial properties that can help fight off infections causing post nasal drip. This is due to the presence of umckalin and other unique triterpenoid compounds.

Immune-boosting: African geranium can help strengthen the immune system, making it easier for the body to fight off infections causing post nasal drip. This is largely due to the high concentration of proanthocyanidins and phenolic acids.

Antioxidant: The herb has antioxidant properties that help protect the body from damage caused by free radicals, which can exacerbate post nasal drip. This is due to the presence of various flavonoids and phenolic acids.
remedy_recipe: Harvest African geranium leaves, rinse, and dry thoroughly, allowing 24 hours of air circulation.
Grind dried leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Measure 500mg of the ground geranium leaf powder per capsule using a digital scale.
Fill size 00 empty gelatin capsules with the measured powder, using a capsule filling machine or by hand.
Store the completed geranium capsules in an airtight container, in a cool, dry place, for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Coltsfoot capsule helps with post nasal drip because it contains mucilage, a substance that can soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the throat and respiratory tract. This herb also has expectorant properties, which can help thin and expel excess mucus from the body. Additionally, coltsfoot has anti-inflammatory effects, which can reduce swelling in the nasal passages and make it easier to breathe. By addressing these underlying causes of post nasal drip, coltsfoot capsules can provide relief from symptoms such as coughing, sore throat, and congestion.
remedy_properties: Expectorant: Coltsfoot capsules help to loosen and expel mucus from the respiratory tract, providing relief from post nasal drip by reducing mucus buildup. This property is due to the presence of mucilage and flavonoids in coltsfoot.

Anti-inflammatory: Coltsfoot has the ability to reduce inflammation in the respiratory tract, alleviating irritation and discomfort caused by post nasal drip. This effect is attributed to the presence of anti-inflammatory compounds like tannins and saponins.

Demulcent: Coltsfoot forms a soothing film over mucous membranes, protecting them from irritants and reducing the symptoms of post nasal drip. The demulcent property is primarily due to the mucilage content in coltsfoot.
Astringent: Coltsfoot capsules can help to tighten and dry up excess mucus in the nasal passages, reducing post nasal drip. This astringent property is attributed to the tannins present in coltsfoot.

Antitussive: Coltsfoot has the ability to suppress coughs, which can be a common symptom associated with post nasal drip. This antitussive effect is due to the presence of alkaloids like colchicine and demecolcine.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2-3 teaspoons of dried coltsfoot herb and grind it into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Measure out 0.5-1 teaspoon of the coltsfoot powder and mix it with an equal amount of filler such as tapioca starch or rice flour.
Fill size 00 empty gelatin capsules with the coltsfoot-filler mixture using a capsule filling machine or by hand.
Store the completed coltsfoot capsules in an airtight container in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.
Take 1-2 capsules up to three times a day, 30 minutes before meals, with a full glass of water.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Wild indigo capsule helps with post nasal drip because it contains active compounds that have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. These compounds work to reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, throat, and sinuses, which can help to alleviate the symptoms of post nasal drip. Additionally, wild indigo can help to stimulate the production of healthy mucus, which can help to flush out irritants and bacteria from the respiratory tract. This can help to reduce the frequency and severity of post nasal drip, providing relief from a persistent and bothersome symptom.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Wild indigo capsules contain the active constituents alkaloids and glycosides, which help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, providing relief from post nasal drip.
Antimicrobial: The isothiocyanates and polyphenols present in wild indigo capsules have antimicrobial properties, helping to combat infections that can cause or worsen post nasal drip.

Immune-boosting: Wild indigo capsules stimulate the immune system, thanks to the active constituents like polysaccharides, which help the body fight off infections and alleviate post nasal drip symptoms.
Expectorant: Wild indigo capsules contain compounds that promote the secretion of mucus and its expulsion from the respiratory tract, making it easier to manage post nasal drip symptoms.

Anti-catarrhal: The anti-catarrhal property of wild indigo capsules, attributed to its flavonoids and saponins, helps reduce the production of excess mucus, thereby providing relief from post nasal drip.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2 parts wild indigo leaves and 1 part each of licorice root and echinacea purpurea herbs, all dried and finely chopped.
Combine 2 tablespoons of the herbal mixture with 1 cup of water in a pot, bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
Strain the liquid and let it cool, then mix in 0.25 teaspoon of non-GMO vegetable cellulose capsule powder.
Fill size 00 empty vegetarian capsules with the herbal mixture, using a capsule filling machine or by hand.
Store the finished capsules in a cool, dry place, and take 2 capsules, 3 times daily, for post nasal drip relief.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Oregon grape capsule helps with post nasal drip because it contains berberine, an alkaloid that has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. These properties can help reduce swelling in the nasal passages and eliminate bacteria that can cause post nasal drip. Additionally, the herb has been shown to stimulate the production of mucus, which can help flush out irritants and allergens that can contribute to the condition. Furthermore, the antioxidants found in Oregon grape can help boost the immune system, which can help the body fight off infections that can lead to post nasal drip. All of these factors make Oregon grape a valuable tool in managing and alleviating post nasal drip.
remedy_properties: Antimicrobial properties: Oregon grape capsules contain berberine alkaloids, which have been shown to have antimicrobial effects, helping to reduce post nasal drip caused by bacterial or viral infections.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The presence of alkaloids and flavonoids in Oregon grape capsules can help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, providing relief from post nasal drip symptoms.
Immunostimulant properties: Oregon grape capsules can help boost the immune system, which is important for managing post nasal drip caused by infections or allergies.
Lymphatic system support: The herb supports lymphatic system function, which can help the body eliminate excess mucus and reduce post nasal drip.
Mucus membrane tonic: Oregon grape capsules contain tannins that can help tighten and tone mucous membranes, reducing post nasal drip and soothing irritated nasal passages.
remedy_recipe: Harvest Oregon grape roots, cleaning them thoroughly and chopping into small pieces to dry for one week.
Grind dried Oregon grape roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Measure out 500mg of the Oregon grape root powder and encapsulate it using size "00" empty capsules.
Store the encapsulated Oregon grape root powder in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Take one capsule three times a day for post nasal drip relief.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat post nasal drip with herbal capsules is by using those made from natural ingredients known to alleviate the condition. Look for supplements containing butterbur, a plant extract that helps reduce inflammation and mucus production. Other effective herbs include turmeric, ginger, and goldenseal, which have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Make sure to follow the recommended dosage and consult with a healthcare professional before starting any new supplement regimen.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to post nasal drip that are treated with herbal capsules include sinusitis, allergies, and bronchitis. Herbal capsules can help alleviate symptoms such as congestion, inflammation, and coughing. For instance, capsules containing butterbur or goldenseal may be used for allergies, while those with echinacea or andrographis can help with sinusitis. In the case of bronchitis, capsules with elecampane or thyme may be recommended. However, it's crucial to consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement regimen.
